reasoning: VIX at 25.87 (HIGH) and rising +5.21% signals elevated fear — strong bearish bias. All sectors down overnight (SPY -1.04%, XLK -0.97%), rotation into risk_off. FOMC was yesterday (2026-03-18), so decision/presser largely priced; no major macro events scheduled for 2026-03-19 itself, reducing acute catalyst risk. Overnight gap flat (+0.02) suggests no overnight conviction, but premarket range 658.58-662.1 (4.5pts) + ribbon BEAR stack confirm intraday bearish setup potential. Fear elevated but not panic-level; without today's events, some risk of stabilization if CPI/NFP data today were positive, but no such events are scheduled.
key_observations: VIX at 25.87, up +5.21% overnight — fear is building, not receding
All major sectors negative: XLK -0.97%, XLF -0.81%, XLE -0.53% — broad risk-off rotation confirmed
FOMC decision was 2026-03-18 (yesterday); presser tail risk receding but market may still be repricing expectations
Zero macro events scheduled for 2026-03-19 — no forced liquidation windows or surprise data catalysts today
Premarket range 658.58-662.1 (4.5pts) + ribbon BEAR stack indicate intraday volatility and bearish alignment
Overnight gap negligible (+0.02) — overnight sentiment neutral; all directional pressure from yesterday's FOMC + rate market repricing
